Off Calendar Mar-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brett Schwenberg, 415.673.5600 for Plaintiffs Nu Concepts Management Group, Inc. and Jianfeng Chen.
Constance Panagotacos, 415.982.2100 for Defendant Robert Mellett.
David Tilloton, 415.957.1800 for Defendant Foxco Limited Partnership.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:
DEFENDANT FOXCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. Plaintiff fails to plead a real property claim or show its probable validity. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
